# Anthropic Newsroom

## Featured Content

### Primary Feature Article
- **Title**: "What 81,000 people want from AI"
- **Date**: Mar 18, 2026
- **Description**: Large multilingual qualitative study of Claude.ai user perspectives

### Recent Product Announcements

1. **Claude Sonnet 4.6** (Feb 17, 2026)
   - Focus: "frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale"

2. **Claude Opus 4.6** (Feb 5, 2026)
   - Capabilities: agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, finance

3. **Claude is a space to think** (Feb 4, 2026)
   - Policy: Ad-free model commitment

4. **Claude on Mars** (Jan 30, 2026)
   - Achievement: First AI-assisted rover drive on Mars (NASA Perseverance, 400 meters)

## Recent News Items (Latest)

- Anthropic invests $100 million into Claude Partner Network (Mar 12)
- The Anthropic Institute launched (Mar 11)
- Sydney becomes fourth Asia-Pacific office (Mar 10)
- Mozilla Firefox security partnership (Mar 6)
- Department of War discussions (Feb 26-27)
- Vercept acquisition for computer use capabilities (Feb 25)
- Responsible Scaling Policy v3.0 (Feb 24)
- Distillation attack detection capabilities (Feb 23)

## Product Portfolio

**Models**: Opus, Sonnet, Haiku

**Applications**: Claude Code, Code Enterprise, Cowork, Chrome extension, Excel plugin, PowerPoint plugin, Slack integration, Skills marketplace

**Plans**: Max, Team, Enterprise

**Platform**: API access, Developer documentation, Marketplace, Regional compliance options, Cloud partnerships (Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, Microsoft Foundry)
